name: Glitch Text
description: RGB-split glitch effect on text using CSS pseudo-elements. Mouse position drives the RGB offset direction. Supports continuous or hover-activated modes.
accessibility_notes: flashing colors may affect photosensitive users

text.description: The text to display with glitch effect

mode.description: Whether glitch runs continuously or only on hover

hoverMultiplier.description: Intensity multiplier applied on hover (hover mode only)

className.description: CSS class for the span element

use_cases: error state or warning text emphasis
conflicts: rapid RGB shifting may cause readability issues at high intensity
usage_tip: Best for cyberpunk-themed headings; avoid on photosensitive-user-facing UIs.
